content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears well-positioned on a westward-heading straight/gentle curve section.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 74, target = (74 + 5) % 121 = 79
- Target WP79: x=2.2890, y=4.4929
- Car: x=2.4225, y=4.4469, heading=165.79°
- dy = 4.4929 - 4.4469 = 0.0460
- dx = 2.2890 - 2.4225 = -0.1335
- bearing = atan2(0.0460, -0.1335) = 180° - atan(0.0460/0.1335) = 180° - 19.0° = 161.0°
- delta = 161.0° - 165.79° = -4.79°
- |delta| < 5°: nearly on line, steer 0°

Delta ≈ -4.8°, essentially straight — use steering=0°, speed=1.5.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track is nearly straight ahead with delta of -4.8° to WP79, car is well-positioned slightly left of center with all wheels on track, so maintaining straight course at full speed.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "Delta under 5° means steer 0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Delta 5-15° use ±5°; 15-30° use ±10 to ±15°; 30-50° use ±15 to ±20°",
    "Near WP73-80, track runs nearly due west with very small deltas",
    "Speed 1.5 safe on straight/gentle curve sections",
    "Car is slightly left of center (~0.05m) but all wheels on track",
    "Heading near 165-166° corresponds to west-northwest travel",
    "When target WP is behind car, use further lookahead WP",
    "WP79 lookahead gives delta near 0° at this section — track is nearly straight",
    "Oversteer warning: avoid excessive correction when near track center"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.613, 2.519, 2.423],
    "y": [4.394, 4.420, 4.447],
    "yaw": [166.67, 166.15, 165.79]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP79 at (2.289, 4.493): dy=0.046, dx=-0.134, bearing=161.0°, delta=-4.8° → nearly straight, steer 0°",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 0.0
}
```
